task.question: How many times does the woman in white hit into the net?
initial_trace_steps: I counted each occurrence of the woman in white hitting the ball into the net. The first occurrence was at 00:33. The second occurrence was at 00:52. I noticed that the final ball hit the top of the net at 01:18, but it went over so I didn't count this. There were no more occurrences in the remainder of the video, so I counted 2.
